zh.lifeSummary: 當David de Barclay Baron of Brechin於1332年出生在蘇格蘭Forfarshire布雷時，他的父親David Barclay39歲，母親Margaret Brechin29歲。他於1362年之前與Janet Keith of Syntoun結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1368年9月8日在英國蘇格蘭Forfarshire布雷享年36歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当David de Barclay Baron of Brechin于1332年出生在苏格兰Forfarshire布雷时，他的父亲David Barclay39岁，母亲Margaret Brechin29岁。他于1362年之前与Janet Keith of Syntoun结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1368年9月8日在英国苏格兰Forfarshire布雷享年36岁。

nameMeanings.name: Barclay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name of English origin, from any of several places so called, such as Berkley in Somerset or Berkeley in Gloucestershire, both named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

History: The surname was brought to Scotland from southwestern England in the 12th century; Walter de Berchelai or Berkelai was Chamberlain of Scotland in 1165. It was long assumed that they were from the family that held Berkeley Castle in Gloucestershire, but the historian G. W. S. Barrow (1973, The Kingdom of the Scots) adduced evidence that they are more probably from Berkley in Somerset.

variants.name: Barkley
meanings: English and northern Irish (Antrim): variant of   Barclay  .
Americanized form of German   Berkel   or of some other similar (like-sounding) German surname.

variants.name: Barclift
meanings: Perhaps an altered form of Scottish   Barclay  .

variants.name: Berkeley
meanings: English: habitational name from one or more of the numerous places so named, such as Berkeley in Gloucestershire, named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Compare Scottish Barclay .
Jewish (American): adoption of the English surname (see 1 above) in place of   Berkowitz  .

variants.name: Brickley
meanings: English and Irish: metathesized form of   Barclay  .

nameMeanings.name: David
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the greatest of all the kings of Israel, whose history is recounted with great vividness in the first and second books of Samuel and elsewhere. As a boy he killed the giant Philistine Goliath with his slingshot. As king of Judah, and later of all Israel, he expanded the power of the Israelites and established the security of their kingdom. He was also noted as a poet, many of the Psalms being attributed to him. The Hebrew derivation of the name is uncertain; it is said by some to represent a nursery word meaning ‘darling’. It is a very popular Jewish name, but is almost equally common among Gentiles in the English-speaking world. It is particularly common in Wales and Scotland, having been borne by the patron saint of Wales (  see  Dewi   ) and by two medieval kings of Scotland.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When David de Barclay Baron of Brechin was born in 1332, in Brechin, Forfarshire, Scotland, his father, David Barclay, was 39 and his mother, Margaret Brechin, was 29. He married Janet Keith of Syntoun before 1362. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 8 September 1368, in Brechin, Forfarshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 36.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque David de Barclay Baron of Brechin est né en 1332, à Brechin, Forfarshire, Écosse, son père, David Barclay, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Margaret Brechin, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Janet Keith of Syntoun avant 1362. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 8 septembre 1368, à Brechin, Forfarshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 36 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als David de Barclay Baron of Brechin 1332 in Brechin, Forfarshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater David Barclay 39 und seine Mutter Margaret Brechin 29. Er hat vor 1362 Janet Keith of Syntoun geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 8. September 1368 im Alter von 36 Jahren in Brechin, Forfarshire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando David de Barclay Baron of Brechin è nato il nel 1332 nel Brechin, Forfarshire, Scotland, il suo padre, David Barclay, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Brechin, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Janet Keith of Syntoun prima del 1362. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 8 settembre 1368, nel Brechin, Forfarshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 36 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: David de Barclay Baron of Brechinが1332年にスコットランドForfarshireブレチンで生まれた時，父David Barclayは39歳，母Margaret Brechinは29歳であった。1362年以前にJanet Keith of Syntounと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1368年9月8日にイギリススコットランドForfarshireブレチンで36歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: David de Barclay Baron of Brechin(이)가 1332년 스컷랜드 Forfarshire 브레친에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 David Barclay(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Brechin(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1362년 이전 Janet Keith of Syntoun(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1368년 9월 8일 영국 스코틀랜드 Forfarshire 브레친에서 36세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando David de Barclay Baron of Brechin nasceu em 1332, em Brechin, Forfarshire, Scotland, seu pai, David Barclay, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Brechin, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Janet Keith of Syntoun antes 1362. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 8 de setembro de 1368, em Brechin, Forfarshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 36 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда David de Barclay Baron of Brechin родился в 1332 г. в местности бречин, Forfarshire, Шотландия, его отцу по имени David Barclay было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Brechin, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Janet Keith of Syntoun перед 1362 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 8 сентября 1368 г. в местности бречин, Forfarshire, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 36 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando David de Barclay Baron of Brechin nació en 1332, en Brechin, Forfarshire, Scotland, su papá, David Barclay, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Margaret Brechin, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Janet Keith of Syntoun antes de 1362. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 8 de septiembre de 1368, en Brechin, Forfarshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 36 años.
